budgetExplained.trackExpenses: Track your expenses and watch your money grow

lesson1.title: The ₹500 Secret
lesson1.hook: You probably spend ₹500 on a single Swiggy order or Netflix.
lesson1.story: Rahul and Sneha both get ₹2000 pocket money. Rahul spends it all. Sneha saves just ₹500 every month in an SIP.
lesson1.explanation: In 5 years, Sneha has ₹42,000+! Rahul has zero. That's the power of compounding. Your money makes babies, and those babies make more babies.

quiz.question: What happens when you save ₹500 consistently?
options: It grows exponentially due to compounding

footer.disclaimerText: This website is for educational purposes only. We are not SEBI registered investment advisers. All information provided is for learning purposes and should not be considered as financial advice. Investing in the stock market involves risk, including the loss of principal. Please consult with a qualified financial advisor before making any investment decisions.
footer.dataLagNotice: For regulatory compliance, all market data and financial calculations shown in this app are based on historical data (30+ days old) and do not represent real-time market conditions.
footer.aboutText: An educational project to improve financial literacy in India. Not financial advice.
